text: The question seems to be based on a misunderstanding, as Photo 51 was not directly taken by the discoverer of the double helix structure. However, given the context and the evidence provided, the discoverer of the double helix structure was James Watson and Francis Crick, both of whom were from the United States. Therefore, the home country of the discoverers of the double helix structure is the United States [doc_dna_double_helix].
